layer: System Hard Boundary & Architecture Protection Layer

architectureStrictlyLayered.evidence: 4 system layers defined (STATE, ENGINE, RENDER, SAFETY) with sequential ranks. Each layer has modules, responsibilities, and forbidden actions.

noCrossLayerContamination.evidence: 6 forbidden leakage patterns defined, all CRITICAL severity. All 6 detection patterns verified. Normal engine flow correctly passes.

deterministicExecution.evidence: 20 mandatory flow rules enforced. Forward flows (STATE→ENGINE, ENGINE→RENDER, RENDER→UI, UI→OBSERVABILITY) allowed. Reverse flows (ENGINE→STATE, UI→STATE, SAFETY→STATE) forbidden. Engine bypass (STATE→RENDER) forbidden. Safety fallback allowed.

failureIsolatedNotPropagated.evidence: All 4 layer failures (STATE, ENGINE, RENDER, SAFETY) properly isolated with islolation=true and cascaded=false. Each produces a unique fallback action. Failure counters track per layer.

stableUnderPartialFailure.evidence: Null callContext handled gracefully. Invalid flow directions return 'not valid'. Unknown layer failures handled. Blocked state returns fallbackRenderTree. Guard resets cleanly.

visualSystemLockdown.l8Check: Architecture Boundary Check integrated as L8 layer

systemGuarantees: Layers are independent — no cross-layer logic allowed
Responsibilities do not overlap — exactly one owner per function
No hidden coupling — explicit inter-layer contracts
Deterministic execution flow — STATE → ENGINE → RENDER → UI → OBSERVABILITY
Failure is isolated — never cascaded upward
Partial failure is handled gracefully — safe fallback provided
